## Summary

Briefly: what does this PR change and why?

## Linked issue / plan

Closes #
(or: implements `Plans/<date>-<slug>.md`)

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (`fix:`)
- [ ] New feature (`feat:`)
- [ ] Refactor with no behavior change (`refactor:`)
- [ ] Documentation (`docs:`)
- [ ] Tooling / CI (`chore:`)
- [ ] Test (`test:`)

## Verification

How did you verify this works? Be specific.

- [ ] `docker compose build` passes locally
- [ ] `pytest tests` passes
- [ ] `cd frontend && npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm test && npm run build` passes
- [ ] Notebook smoke test passes: `from icell.pipeline import run_pipeline; run_pipeline()`
- [ ] Manual smoke test in the UI (describe what you clicked through)

## Behavior change?

- [ ] No behavior change (refactor / docs / tooling)
- [ ] Behavior change — describe and justify below:

(If yes:)

## Risk

What could break that isn't covered by the verification above? What's the rollback plan?

## Notes for reviewers

Anything that helps the reviewer focus their attention.
